MIME-Version: 1.0
From: Samsung account <sa.noreply@samsung-mail.com>
To: Emil Skogsund <emil.skogsund@gmail.com>
Date: Sat, 14 Dec 2024 18:53:30 +0000
Subject: Easily verify using a “One time permission for Samsung account”!
Message-ID: <817450543.4518192.1734202410667@messagegw-cdf5549f4-kbfdb>
Content-Type: text/html; charset="UTF-8"

<!doctype html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<title>Easily verify using a “One time permission for Samsung account”!</title>
</head>

<body style="margin: 0; padding: 0;">
<div dir="ltr" lang="en" style="max-width: 100&#37;; width:600px; margin: 0 auto; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, &#39;sans-serif&#39;; font-weight: normal; font-size:16px; line-height: 22px; color: #252525; word-wrap: break-word; word-break: break-word;text-align: left;">	<div title="logo" style="padding: 23px 24px 23px 24px; box-sizing: border-box;"><a href="#" target="_blank"><img src="https://account.samsung.com/accounts/v1/resources/one-ui/images/layout/txt_logo.png" alt="Samsung Account" style="height: 14px;" border="0"></a></div>
	<div title="email" style="padding: 24px 24px 24px 24px; margin: 0;">
		<div title="title" style="font-size: 24px; line-height: 1.17; color: #252525; margin:0 0 40px 0; padding: 0;">Easily verify using a “One time permission for Samsung account”!</div>
		<div title="content" style="font-size: 16px; line-height: 22px; color: #252525;">
			Dear Customer,<br>
			<br>
			To continue, please click the button below.
			<br>
			<div title="button" style="text-align: center; margin: 24px 0 40px 0; padding: 0;">
				<a href="https://account.samsung.?nextURL=continueWithGoogleByMagicLink" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block; margin: 0 auto; min-width: 180px; line-height: 28px; border-radius: 22px; padding: 8px 16px 7px 16px; vertical-align: middle; background-color: #0072de; color: #fff; box-sizing: border-box; text-align: center; text-decoration: none; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, &#39;sans-serif&#39;; font-weight: normal;  word-wrap: break-word; word-break: break-all;">
					Continue with Emil Skogsund
				</a>
			</div>

			<p style="margin: 0 0 20px 0; padding: 0; font-size: 16px; color: #505050; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, &#39;sans-serif&#39;; font-weight: normal;  word-wrap: break-word; word-break: break-word;">
				You can only use this link for 30 minutes after receiving this email.<br>To make your account more secure, please <a href="https://account.samsung.?nextURL=continueWithGoogleByChangePassword" target="_blank" style="color: #1428a0; text-decoration:underline;">register your Samsung account password</a>.
			</p>
			
			<p style="margin: 0 0 60px 0; padding: 0; font-size: 16px; color: #505050; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, &#39;sans-serif&#39;; font-weight: normal;  word-wrap: break-word; word-break: break-word;">
				Your Samsung account team
			</p>
			
			<p style="margin: 0 0 24px 0; padding: 0; color: #252525; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, &#39;sans-serif&#39;; font-weight: normal;  word-wrap: break-word; word-break: break-word; font-size: 12px; line-height: 16px; color: #909090;">
				Note: Don&#39;t reply to this email. Contact us with any queries by visiting the <br>
				<a href="https://help.content.samsung.com/csweb/faq/searchFaq.do" target="_blank" style="color: #0072de; text-decoration: underline; font-size: 12px; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, &#39;sans-serif&#39;; font-weight: normal;  word-wrap: break-word; word-break: break-word;">Samsung account customer center.</a>
			</p>
			<div title="footer" style="margin: 0; padding: 40px 0 0 0; box-sizing: border-box;">
				<div title="footer-logo" style="margin: 0 0 2px 0; padding: 0;"><img src="https://account.samsung.com/accounts/v1/resources/one-ui/images/layout/txt_foo_logo.png" alt="Samsung Account" border="0" style="height: 16px;"></div>
				<div title="copyright" style="margin: 0; padding: 0; font-size:10px; opacity:0.6; font-weight: 300; line-height: 12px; color: #252525; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, &#39;sans-serif&#39;; font-weight: normal;  word-wrap: break-word; word-break: break-word;">
					Copyright © 1995-2024 Samsung. All Rights Reserved.
				</div>
			</div>
		</div>
	</div>
</div>	

</body>
</html>
